title: Add #![forbid(unsafe_code)] to remaining no_std crates (kiss, meshtastic, node, hal check) and audit all unsafe blocks
description: Scan all no_std public crates in rust/ for missing #![forbid(unsafe_code)] at crate root. Add where missing (lichen-kiss, lichen-meshtastic, lichen-node etc.). Verify only unsafe is in gateway/tun.rs (std). Update Cargo.toml or other files if needed for consistency. Close related beads.
